2605.08533.title: Human-LLM Dialogue Improves Diagnostic Accuracy in Emergency Care
2605.08533.paper_summary: Clinical decision-making in emergency medicine demands rapid, accurate diagnoses under uncertainty. Despite benchmark progress, evidence for LLMs as interactive aids in live physician workflows remains sparse. MedSyn lets physicians iteratively query an LLM provided with the full clinical record while initially viewing only the chief complaint. Seven physicians (three seniors, four residents) completed baseline and AI-assisted sessions across 52 MIMIC-IV cases stratified by difficulty. Blinded evaluation showed residents' Hard-case correctness rose from 0.589 to 0.734; difficulty-standardised completely-correct rates confirmed a medium effect (Δ = 0.092; p = 0.071; d = 0.47). Automated metrics corroborated these gains: standardised any-match accuracy improved by 0.156 (p < 0.0001), and residents showed the largest F1 gain (Δ = 0.138; p < 0.0001). Dialogue analysis revealed expertise-dependent strategies (seniors asked targeted, hypothesis-driven questions; residents relied on broader queries) and cross-expertise concordance increased (Δ = 0.145; p < 0.0001). Interactive LLM support meaningfully enhances diagnostic reasoning.
2605.08533.paper_summary_zh: 臨床決策在急診醫學中要求在不確定性下迅速、準確地進行診斷。儘管在基準進展方面取得了一定成就，但有關大型語言模型（LLMs）作為實時醫生工作流程中的互動輔助工具的證據仍然稀少。MedSyn 讓醫生在最初僅查看主要抱怨的情況下，反覆查詢提供完整臨床記錄的 LLM。七位醫生（三位高年級醫生，四位住院醫師）在52個根據難度分層的 MIMIC-IV 案例中完成了基線和 AI 輔助會議。盲評顯示住院醫師在難題的正確率從 0.589 上升至 0.734；難度標準化的完全正確率確認了中等效應（Δ = 0.092；p = 0.071；d = 0.47）。自動化指標證實了這些增益：標準化的任意匹配準確率提高了 0.156（p < 0.0001），住院醫師顯示出最大的 F1 增益（Δ = 0.138；p < 0.0001）。對話分析揭示了依賴專業知識的策略（高年級醫生提出針對性的、假設驅動的問題；住院醫師依賴更廣泛的查詢），並且跨專業的一致性增加（Δ = 0.145；p < 0.0001）。互動式 LLM 支持顯著增強了診斷推理。
2605.08533.author: Burcu Sayin et.al.
2605.08533.authors: Burcu Sayin, Ngoc Vo Hong, Ipek Baris Schlicht, Jacopo Staiano, Pasquale Minervini, Sara Allievi, Nicola Susca, Nicola Osti, Alberto Maino, Vito Racanelli, Andrea Passerini
